headline: Assessing IDEX (IEX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Premium P/E Multiple
summary: IDEX (IEX) has drawn investor attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at US$214.93 and showing positive returns over the past month and past 3 months. That performance now sits alongside a value score of 1. See our latest analysis for IDEX. While the share price slipped 1.3% over the last session, the 7 day share price return of 5.0% and year to date share price return of 20.0% suggest momentum has been building alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 20.3%. headline: 2 Profitable Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".
